items.name: Gangs Apparel - Frostline Varsity Jacket
items.description:
A bold varsity jacket with a cold street attitude.
The deep blue body is paired with icy white sleeves, finished with a clean front zipper and premium embroidery.
Featuring the iconic “gang” text on the chest and a powerful crowned emblem, this jacket represents loyalty, unity, and street dominance.
Perfect for streetwear fits, gang aesthetics, and standout Roblox avatars.
